blockers.description: DashScope `agent_max` (and `agent`) search_strategy puts the API into Agent mode, which is mutually exclusive with custom `tools: CANVAS_TOOLS`. This is what produced the chat 400 error this session.
blockers.workaround: Path-B fix applied at server.js:774 — fell back to `max` (multi-round, non-agent). v3.2 phase 26 will properly migrate to DashScope Responses API where builtin agent tools coexist with custom function tools.
Long-standing v1.0 blocker; not relevant to Phase 21

human_actions_pending.context: Edit applied this session: `search_strategy: options.strategy || "agent_max"` → `search_strategy: options.strategy || "max"`. Suggested commit message: `fix(21): fall back search_strategy to max to unblock CANVAS_TOOLS coexistence`

human_actions_pending.action: Start `npm run dev` in a second terminal
human_actions_pending.context: Plan 06 verification needs the live server
If the current qwen3.6-plus snapshot rejects `max`, fall back to omitting `search_strategy` entirely (plain enable_search). Phase 26 (Responses API) eliminates this fragility.

decisions.decision: Apply path-B one-line fix (search_strategy: agent_max → max) to unblock chat 400
decisions.rationale: agent_max puts DashScope into Agent mode which forbids custom `tools` array. `max` keeps multi-round search behavior without agent orchestration, so CANVAS_TOOLS continues to work.

decisions.decision: Open new v3.2 milestone 'Qwen Web Parity' instead of extending v3.1
decisions.rationale: v3.1 was scoped for chat reliability + dynamic dirs + file rendering + context + parallel gen. The Qwen-web-parity work (Responses API, document chat, image polish, video, voice, deep research viz, embedding upgrade) is materially new scope and deserves its own milestone story.
User chose conservative sequential execution over parallel tracks. Phase 26 (Responses API Migration) is the keystone — once builtin agent tools coexist with CANVAS_TOOLS, all later phases simplify.

decisions.decision: Phase 26 will migrate the chat endpoint to DashScope Responses API
decisions.rationale: Only the Responses API allows builtin web_search + code_interpreter + web_extractor to coexist with user-defined function tools. This permanently eliminates the agent-mode-vs-tools tradeoff that forced path-B fix.
`agent` ALSO forbids tools (it's the same Agent mode behind agent_max). `max` is the highest non-agent multi-round tier.
Those are non-agent options and do not interact with the tools array — preserved through the fix.

decisions.decision: Switch search_strategy from turbo to agent_max
decisions.rationale: Match official Qwen app multi-round agentic search ('几十个网页')

decisions.decision: Default web search ON with negation block-list

decisions.rationale: Inline source markers so the answer is verifiable
optionTemplate previously had no place for plan.steps/todo.items/etc

decisions.decision: Use micromark-extension-gfm for chat reply rendering
decisions.rationale: Bare CommonMark micromark@4 doesn't emit tables/task-lists/del

decisions.decision: Document content shapes per nodeType in canvas_action tool schema
decisions.rationale: Model needs to know content.steps shape; without it create_plan fired with only a title

context_notes: This session deeply analyzed the full DashScope API surface (10 capability groups: Chat Completions / Responses / Application API / Files+qwen-long / qwen-deep-research streaming / qwen-image sync+async+edit / wan2.x video / qwen3.5-omni-plus-realtime websocket + ASR + TTS / qwen-mt translation / text-embedding-v4 + gte-rerank-v2). Key discovery: `search_strategy: agent_max` is Qwen-web's private internal tier (not in DashScope public docs) — it triggers Agent mode, which is mutually exclusive with `tools: [...]`. This explained the user's chat 400 error. Three fix paths identified: (A) Migrate to DashScope Responses API where builtin web_search + custom function tools coexist [proper, scoped as v3.2 phase 26]; (B) One-line `search_strategy` change to `max` [path B, applied this session]; (C) Client-side Qwen-Agent orchestration [out of scope]. v3.2 plan covers 7 sequential phases agreed with the user: 26 Responses API Migration / 27 Document Chat (Files API + qwen-long 10M ctx) / 28 Image Generation Polish (qwen-image-max async + edit) / 29 Video Generation (wan2.x text/image/first-last-frame/s2v) / 30 Voice (qwen3.5-omni-plus-realtime + qwen3-asr-flash + qwen3-tts-flash + cosyvoice) / 31 Deep Research Visualization (streamingWebResult/WebResultFinished/KeepAlive phase UI) / 32 Embedding Upgrade (text-embedding-v4 + gte-rerank-v2 for material library RAG). When resuming: DO NOT redo the analysis or re-litigate the v3.2 plan — it's agreed. Just execute: commit fix → run E2E → ship phase 21 → /gsd-new-milestone.
